pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly inserts demographic_no 10001 into the database.
setup_task.sh dynamically injects the patient as first_name="Maria", last_name="Santos".
setup_task.sh statically assigns serviceId 1 to the Cardiology consultation service.
setup_task.sh directly assigns Robert Hartfield as the professionalSpecialist.
verifier.py scores based on exactly these substring keywords being found in the combined clinical notes.
verifier.py accepts exactly these strings to confirm urgency was set correctly.
../../scripts/setup_oscar.sh configures these default demo credentials directly in the MySQL database.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on a synthetically seeded Oscar EMR database. The target patient Maria Santos is dynamically injected with demographic_no 10001, alongside a Cardiology service (serviceId 1) and specialist Robert Hartfield (specId 1). The verifier logic strictly matches the urgency against ["urgent", "1", "u"] and searches for clinical keywords ["chest pain", "cardiac", "st-segment", "stress test"] in the request content. Additionally, the system correctly configures the oscardoc user with the required password and PIN via setup_oscar.sh.
